title: dendranthema indicum var. tsurugisanense
intro: Dendranthema indicum var. tsurugisanense, also known as Tsurugisan dandelion or Japanese dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family native to Japan. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dendranthema indicum var. tsurugisanense include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and promote cardiovascular health, due to its rich content of bioactive compounds such as sesquiterpene lactones and triterpenoids. Dendranthema indicum var. tsurugisanense can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine in the form of dried roots and rhizomes.
